nodes.name: Myzomela
nodes.summary: Myzomela（Myzomela）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联41种鸟类，如Drab myzomela、White-chinned myzomela、Ruby-throated myzomela等41种鸟类。

nodes.name: Red-vested myzomela
nodes.summary: Red-vested myzomela（Myzomela malaitae）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Red-vested myzomela。

nodes.name: Red-vested myzomela
nodes.summary: The red-vested myzomela (Myzomela malaitae), also known as the red-bellied myzomela, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Malaita (Solomon Islands). Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
